inputs.shares_source: 104,912,853 ordinary shares at June 30, 2025 (20-F FY2025 cover page)
inputs.shares_fully_diluted_note: Excludes ~14.5M shares for Tanbreez Stage 2 (92.5%), GEM warrant settlement, and warrant overhang [HUMAN REVIEW]
inputs.cash_source: Cash on hand $7.3M at June 30, 2025 (20-F FY2025 going-concern disclosure)
inputs.total_assets_source: Total assets $171.7M at June 30, 2025 vs $59.4M prior year (20-F balance sheet / filing_facts)
inputs.tanbreez_ownership_source: 42% equity interest in Tanbreez Mining Greenland A/S (20-F FY2025 Item 4.D)
inputs.tanbreez_resource_source: Indicated 25.42 Mt + Inferred 19.45 Mt = 44.87 Mt at 0.38% TREO (20-F Tanbreez resource table)
inputs.pea_npv_source: Company PEA press release March 31, 2025 cited in 20-F; pre-tax project NPV ~$3B at 12.5-15% discount [Assumption — not equity NAV]
inputs.wolfsberg_resource_source: Measured+Indicated 9.7 Mt at 1.03% Li2O + Inferred 3.1 Mt at 0.90% Li2O (20-F Wolfsberg table)
inputs.bmw_advance_source: BMW offtake advance payment $15.0M June 5, 2024; restricted until Wolfsberg production (20-F)
inputs.normalization_note: Pre-production explorer/evaluator. No mining revenue. Lawrence owner cash is negative (operating outflow). Value is risked asset option on Tanbreez (Greenland REE), Wolfsberg (Austria lithium), and minority lithium stakes — not filing OCF.

bear.notes: Greenland permitting delay or DFS failure; GEM arbitration cash/shares; repeated equity raises; cash floor erodes; Tanbreez option impaired

base.notes: Partial risked value on 42% Tanbreez stake after DFS, financing, and dilution; Wolfsberg/BMW path delayed; heavy haircut vs company PEA NPV

sotp_build.notes: Lawrence base with partial production option

gaap_vs_fair_value.note: Mineral rights and exploration assets on balance sheet ($171.7M total assets) are not marked to PEA NPV; PEA is pre-tax project-level and highly uncertain

nav_overlay.notes: Do not use GAAP book as dhando floor

optionality_gate.notes: Economic floor ~$0.0/sh (not GAAP book); spot copper $4.0/unit; option yield ~0.0%

evidence_refresh.notes: Rare earth and lithium spot inform overlay context; not auto-included in Lawrence base IRR

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Total assets $171.7M includes mineral interests; PEA cites ~$3B pre-tax project NPV vs $7.3M cash (20-F)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: 44.87 Mt Tanbreez resource (mostly inferred); 4.7 Bt host rock kakortokite; no production (20-F)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Net loss $51.9M FY2025; operating cash outflow $14.5M; exploration spend (20-F)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF?
option_scan.evidence: BMW $15M advance restricted; Ucore REE offtake LOI August 2025 (20-F)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: 42% Tanbreez; 20% Weinebene/Eastern Alps lithium; Wolfsberg subsidiary (20-F)

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: No operating revenue from mining yet

stance.rationale: Pre-production resource option; base risked payoff below 15% hurdle at $6.40

marvin_floor.notes: Cash per share at June 30, 2025; not a durable floor given burn and going concern

blended_best.notes: Risked seven-year asset payoff; filings only; no approved third-party blend

growth_explanation.mechanism: Value creation requires Tanbreez DFS, Greenland approvals, project financing, and first production — not operating cash flow compounding.
falsifiers: DFS delayed beyond 2026 or fails economic viability test
GEM arbitration forces material cash or share settlement

catalyst_paths.impact: Partial risked value on 42% Tanbreez stake after DFS, financing, and dilution; Wolfsberg/BMW path delayed; heavy haircut vs company PEA NPV
Greenland permitting delay or DFS failure; GEM arbitration cash/shares; repeated equity raises; cash floor erodes; Tanbreez option impaired

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

additive_components.label: Corporate cash (soft floor)

source.locator: Going-concern disclosure; cash on hand $7.3 million at June 30, 2025
Cover page; 104,912,853 ordinary shares outstanding June 30, 2025

assumptions.label: Realizable cash after going-concern burn stress
assumptions.rationale: Low haircuts cash for near-term burn; base ties to $0.07/sh filing cash; high assumes no immediate liquidity impairment.

additive_components.assumption_summary: Filing cash $7.3M divided by 104.9M shares with bounded realizable fraction.
additive_components.falsifier: Next filing shows cash below $5M without matching liability release or equity raise.

additive_components.label: Tanbreez 42% REE stake (risked)

source.locator: Cover page; 104,912,853 ordinary shares outstanding June 30, 2025

assumptions.label: Probability Tanbreez reaches financed production (42% stake)
assumptions.rationale: Reference-class haircut on PEA; base ~15% after DFS and Greenland Stage 2 approval.

assumptions.label: Gross equity success value to CRML shareholders (42% Tanbreez path)
assumptions.rationale: Anchored to company PEA ~$3B pre-tax project NPV at 42% ownership, heavily risked vs project-level headline.

assumptions.label: Remaining owner-funded project capital embedded in range
assumptions.rationale: Capex and financing overhang embedded in success_value range, not double-counted.

additive_components.evidence: 44.87 Mt @ 0.38% TREO; PEA ~$3B pre-tax project NPV heavily risked (20-F)
additive_components.assumption_summary: PEA-anchored gross success value × reference-class probability ÷ shares; capex embedded in range.
additive_components.falsifier: DFS delayed beyond 2026, Greenland blocks Stage 2, or PEA assumptions fail economic viability test.

additive_components.label: Wolfsberg lithium option

source.locator: Cover page; 104,912,853 ordinary shares outstanding June 30, 2025
Offtake Agreement; BMW advance payment US$15.0 million June 5, 2024, restricted until Wolfsberg production

assumptions.label: Probability Wolfsberg milestone unlocks shareholder value
assumptions.rationale: Low assumes Wolfsberg path fails before production; base/high credit restricted advance plus milestone option.

assumptions.label: Gross milestone success value (advance plus development option)
assumptions.rationale: Base anchored above BMW $15M advance; high adds scaled development upside on M+I 9.7 Mt resource.

assumptions.label: Remaining Wolfsberg capex before milestone
assumptions.rationale: Remaining capex embedded in success_value range.

additive_components.evidence: BMW $15M restricted advance; M+I 9.7 Mt @ 1.03% Li2O (20-F)
additive_components.assumption_summary: Milestone NAV anchored to BMW $15M restricted advance; production unlock required.
additive_components.falsifier: BMW offtake terminated or advance forfeited before Wolfsberg production milestone.

additive_components.label: Dilution and GEM overhang reserve

source.locator: inputs.price; Yahoo CRML close 2026-07-18
Amended Tanbreez agreement; up to 14.5M shares for Stage 2 to 92.5% ownership
Cover page; 104,912,853 ordinary shares outstanding June 30, 2025

assumptions.label: Combined Stage 2 and GEM overhang reserve as fraction of price
assumptions.rationale: Low includes GEM arbitration and full Stage 2 dilution; base partial reserve; high minimal additional issuance.

additive_components.assumption_summary: Negative reserve for Stage 2 share issuance and GEM overhang as fraction of price today.
additive_components.falsifier: GEM arbitration forces cash settlement above low-case reserve or Stage 2 shares issued above 14.5M without matching asset uplift.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One ordinary share of Critical Metals Corp., including net cash, risked Tanbreez rare earth stake (42%), Wolfsberg lithium option, and dilution reserves.
economic_claim.unit_source: 104,912,853 ordinary shares at June 30, 2025 (20-F FY2025 cover page)
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Pre-production explorer. Equity equals cash plus risked mineral stakes less dilution reserves; balance sheet assets are not marked to PEA NPV.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~15% Tanbreez development success after DFS and Greenland Stage 2.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Base ~7 years aligned with Lawrence scenario horizon.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Project capex not yet funded; embedded in component ranges.

valuation_proof.falsifier: Next filing shows cash below $5M without matching liability release or equity raise.

valuation_proof.evidence: 44.87 Mt @ 0.38% TREO; PEA ~$3B pre-tax project NPV heavily risked (20-F)
valuation_proof.falsifier: DFS delayed beyond 2026, Greenland blocks Stage 2, or PEA assumptions fail economic viability test.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Base ~7 years aligned with Lawrence scenario horizon.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~15% Tanbreez development success after DFS and Greenland Stage 2.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Project capex not yet funded; embedded in component ranges.

valuation_proof.evidence: BMW $15M restricted advance; M+I 9.7 Mt @ 1.03% Li2O (20-F)
valuation_proof.falsifier: BMW offtake terminated or advance forfeited before Wolfsberg production milestone.

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

falsifiers: Next filing shows cash below $5M without matching liability release or equity raise.
DFS delayed beyond 2026, Greenland blocks Stage 2, or PEA assumptions fail economic viability test.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

paths.label: Blended best estimate (Marvin + external)
paths.notes: Risked seven-year asset payoff; filings only; no approved third-party blend
paths.weight_why: Primary holding-period path after partial credit for approved external normalization.

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Corporate cash (soft floor)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?
